title: neoussuria firma
intro: Neoussuria firma, also known as Neoussuria or Firmiana, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neoussuria firma include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Neoussuria firma typically involve drying the roots and leaves, then making tea or infusions from them, or using the extracts in capsule or tincture form.
